title: Why is the new house special?

meanings.usage: 指书写或打印的通信文件，通常指纸质信件
指同父母或同父异母/同母异父的女性
作为专有名词，首字母大写
指令人意想不到的事情或突然的惊喜感
用于描述外观、景色等令人愉悦的事物
作'乡村'讲时，与city（城市）相对
指完成某项任务或工程
指当代的、当前的风格或设计
指不寻常的、不熟悉的事物或情况
指一个国家或城市内的某个特定区域
指种植花草或蔬菜的土地空间
指建筑物内的独立空间或可用的空间
用于过去将来时态中，表示从过去角度看将要发生的事
强调在某范围内独一无二

meanings.meaning: 可爱的；美丽的；令人愉快的
meanings.usage: 用于形容令人愉悦的人或事物

examples.en: I had a letter from my sister yesterday.
examples.zh: 昨天我收到了姐姐的来信。

examples.en: If she comes, she will get a surprise.
examples.zh: 如果她来，她会大吃一惊。
她可以和我们住在一起。

examples.en: We are now living in the country.
Work on it had begun before my sister left.
examples.zh: 在我姐姐离开之前，工程就已经开始了。

examples.en: She would come to England next year.
The house was completed five months ago.
It must be the only modern house in the district.
examples.zh: 它一定是这个地区唯一的现代房子。

examples.en: It looks strange to some people.
examples.zh: 对某些人来说它看起来很奇怪。

examples.en: The house has many large rooms.
examples.zh: 这所房子有许多大房间。

grammar.title: 过去将来时 (Future in the Past)
grammar.definition: 表示从过去的角度来看将要发生的动作或状态，常用于宾语从句中。
grammar.structure: 主语 + would + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 当主句用过去时，从句要表示将来意义时使用。常用在said, told, thought等动词后的宾语从句中。

examples.en: She said that she would come to England next year.
In her letter, she said that she would come to England next year.
examples.zh: 在信中，她说第二年她会来英国。

grammar.title: must be 推测用法
grammar.definition: 表示根据逻辑推理得出的必然结论，意为'一定是'、'肯定是'
grammar.structure: 主语 + must be + 名词/形容词
grammar.usage: 用于对当前情况有把握的推测，语气比might be、could be更强

examples.en: It must be the only modern house in the district.
examples.zh: 它一定是这个地区唯一的现代房子。

examples.en: She must be at home now.

grammar.title: if 条件句（真实条件句）
grammar.definition: if引导的条件句，表示真实的或可能发生的情况
grammar.structure: If + 主语 + 一般现在时, 主语 + will + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于谈论真实的、可能发生的条件与结果

examples.en: If she comes, she will get a surprise.
examples.zh: 如果她来，她会得到一个惊喜。

examples.en: If it rains tomorrow, I will stay at home.
examples.zh: 如果明天下雨，我就待在家里。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had a letter from + 某人

original.en: I had a letter from my sister yesterday.
original.zh: 昨天我收到了姐姐的来信。

imitations.en: I had a letter from my friend last week.
imitations.zh: 上周我收到了朋友的来信。

imitations.en: She had a letter from her mother this morning.
imitations.zh: 今天早上她收到了妈妈的来信。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + would come to + 地点 + 时间

original.en: She would come to England next year.

imitations.en: He would come to China next month.
They would come to our school tomorrow.
imitations.zh: 他们明天会来我们学校。

sentencePatterns.pattern: If + 主语 + 一般现在时, 主语 + will + 动词原形

original.en: If she comes, she will get a surprise.
original.zh: 如果她来，她会得到一个惊喜。

imitations.en: If it is sunny, we will go to the park.
imitations.zh: 如果天气好，我们就去公园。

imitations.en: If you study hard, you will pass the exam.
imitations.zh: 如果你努力学习，你就会通过考试。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + must be + 名词/形容词

original.en: It must be the only modern house in the district.
original.zh: 它一定是这个地区唯一的现代房子。

imitations.en: This must be the correct answer.
